title: senecio lithostaurus
intro: Senecio lithostaurus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Senecio lithostaurus include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Senecio lithostaurus can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or topical applications, but it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it, as it can be toxic in large quantities.
